UnitAbilities.Title: Will of the Hive Mind
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly Tyranids unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Paroxysm (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Will of the Hive Mind
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly Tyranids unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hive Commander
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malign Presence
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of this model with a stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Designer’s Note: This ability takes precedence over the Lord of Deceit ability presented in the Balance Dataslate June 2024.

UnitAbilities.Title: Domination of the Hive Mind
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 9" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Synapse Range.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vicious Insight
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hypnotic Gaze (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Blow
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spawn Termagants
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Termagants unit within 6" of this model and return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit. A Termagants unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brood Progenitor (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Termagants unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unstoppable Monster
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Weapons.Name: Old One Eye’s claws & talons – strike
Old One Eye’s claws & talons – sweep

UnitAbilities.Title: Adaptable Predators
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Adrenalised Onslaught
UnitAbilities.Text:
At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following abilities to apply to models in this unit until the end of the phase:
	▪ Aggression Imperative: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
	▪ Preservation Imperative: Each time a saving throw is made for a model in this unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Skulking Horrors
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Bounding Leap
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

UnitAbilities.Title: Winged Swarm
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grasping Tendrils
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Titanic units) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability is selected to Fall Back, you can roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit must Remain Stationary instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hypertoxic Miasma (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

Options: bone cleaver & lash whip & rending claws

UnitAbilities.Title: Guardian Organism
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Character model is leading this unit, that Character has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Weapons.Name: Bone cleaver & lash whip & rending claws

UnitAbilities.Title: Node Lash (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychic Terror (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: If one or more Neurotyrants from your army are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Neuroloids
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, you can select up to two friendly Tyranids units within 18" of this model’s unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected units are always considered to be within Synapse Range of your army.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place a Neuroloid token next to each selected unit to remind you.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feeder Tendrils
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pheromone Trail
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, you can target one model with this ability with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feeder Tendrils
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fear of the Unseen (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: HUNTER ORGANISM
Infos.Text: This model cannot be your Warlord.

UnitAbilities.Title: Encephalic Diffusion (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll, and, if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Burning Spray
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grisly Spectacle
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Foul Spores (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, while a friendly Tyranids unit (excluding Monsters) is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pouncing Leap
UnitAbilities.Text:
You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is -1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Neurocytes
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is within Synapse Range of a friendly Tyranids unit (excluding Neurogaunts units), it has the Synapse keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spirit Leech (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Neurothrope, while an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds and one model in this unit regains up to D3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warp Field (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vanguard Predator
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

UnitAbilities.Title: Chitinous Horrors (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Parasitic Infection
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an Infantry model is destroyed by an attack made with this model’s barbed ovipositor, after this model has finished making its attacks, you can add one new Ripper Swarms unit to your army consisting of D3 models and set it up within 3" of this model. If you do, that Ripper Swarms unit can be set up within Engagement Range of the destroyed model’s unit (but not within Engagement Range of any other enemy units).

UnitAbilities.Title: It Itches!
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terror From The Deep
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-4, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Subterranean Tunnels
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can use a subterranean tunnel. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bio-minefield
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Floating Death
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bio-minefield
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Floating Death
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Symbiotic Targeting
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Tyranids model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Seed Spore Mines
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your Shooting Phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new Spore Mines unit to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 48" of this unit and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units. That Spore Mines unit contains 1 model for each model in this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: SPORE MINE ABILITY: Bio-minefield
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units cannot start or end an Advance move within 6" of this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: SPORE MINE ABILITY: Floating Death
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3" of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Weapons.Name: Spore Mine launcher
Weapons.Keywords: BLAST, DEVASTATING WOUNDS, HEAVY, INDIRECT FIRE

UnitAbilities.Title: Blistering Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+2".

UnitAbilities.Title: Death Scream
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Defensive Stance
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if this unit is within range of an objective marker.

UnitAbilities.Title: Resilient Organism
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this mode, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Seeding
UnitAbilities.Text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 20 Tyranids Infantry models, or 1 Tyranids Monster model with a Wounds characteristic of 12 or less. Each Infantry model with a Wounds characteristic of more than 1 takes up the space of 3 models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Airborne Predator
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spore Mine Cysts
UnitAbilities.Text:
At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can do one of the following:
▪ Select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit and roll six D6 for that unit: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
▪ Add a new Spore Mines unit containing D3 models to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is within 6" of this model and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units. You cannot select this option for more than one model per turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Seed Mucolids
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with it's ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new Mucolid Spores containing 1 model to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 18" of this model and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hive Defences
UnitAbilities.Text: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bio-stimulus (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Tyranids unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feeding Frenzy
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

UnitAbilities.Title: Disruption Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks made by this unit’s bio-cannons. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is disrupted. While a unit is disrupted, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Frenzied Metabolism
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. After resolving those attacks, roll one D6: on a 2+, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 20 Gargoyles models and 1 Winged Tyranid Prime model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Apex-beast
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Stalking Forward
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-10 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 20 Tyranids Infantry models. Each model with a Wounds characteristic of more than 1 takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can Fly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Singular Purpose:
UnitAbilities.Text:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
	▪ Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
	▪ Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

UnitAbilities.Title: Unnateral Resilience:
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Singular Purpose:
UnitAbilities.Text:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:
	▪ Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
	▪ Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harpoon Barbs:
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn when an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 2+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Feeder Tendrills:
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Neural Disruption:
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Psychological Saboteur (Aura):
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is within 12" of this model, if that unit is Battle-shocked:
	▪ Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
	▪ Each time a friendly Tyranids model makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Death From Below
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Units.Name: HYPERADAPTED RAVENERS
Units.Faction: Shadow In The Warp (Ravener Prime only), Synapse

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Invader
UnitAbilities.Text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Hypersensory Array
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Alpha Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text: Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aggressive Leader-beast
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Swallow Whole
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack with this model’s gaping maw targets an Infantry, Mounted or Beasts unit, each successful unmodified Wound roll is a Critical Wound. Each time an Infantry, Mounted or Beasts model is destroyed as a result of an attack made by this model’s gaping maw, this model regains up to D3+2 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Subterranean Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Serpentine Fiend
UnitAbilities.Text: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of Ruins, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

Rule.Title: MINDHUNGER
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor units have Deep Strike.
▪ Friendly Lictor/Neurolictor units’ attacks that target a Character unit can re-roll hit rolls of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Counterpredation
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers unit is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 S and AP.

Stratagems.Name: Hypersensory Adaptations
Stratagems.When: Start of your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Scanner Gheist
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Encircling Horrors
Enhancements.Description: Neurolictor/Lictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers unit only. In your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

Enhancements.Name: Cryptophotaic Camouflage
Enhancements.Description: Von Ryan’s Leapers unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

AddedAbilities.Title: MINDHUNGER
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Friendly Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor units have Deep Strike.
	▪ Friendly Lictor/Neurolictor units’ attacks that target a Character unit can re-roll hit rolls of 1.

Rule.Title: HIGHER IMPERATIVES
Rule.Text:
Friendly Norn Emissary/Norn Assimilator units have the following ability:

Protean Purpose: (Once per battle, per unit) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit can make a selection for its Singular Purpose ability (this replaces the previous selection).

Stratagems.Name: Catalytic Biofortification
Stratagems.When: Any phase, when a friendly Norn Assimilator unit suffers a mortal wound.
Stratagems.Target: That Norn Assimilator unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Lesser Prey
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, when a friendly Norn Assimilator/Norn Emissary unit is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Norn Assimilator/Norn Emissary unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s melee attacks have +2 S.

Stratagems.Name: Tanglestrike Rounds
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Norn Assimilator unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Norn Assimilator unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit is tethered until the start of your next Command phase:
	▪ While a unit is tethered, that unit has -2" M.

Enhancements.Name: Destabilising Predation
Enhancements.Description: Norn Emissary unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have [ANTI-CHARACTER 2+].

Enhancements.Name: Synaptoprescience
Enhancements.Description: Norn Assimilator unit only. This unit has 4+ InSv.

AddedAbilities.Title: Protean Purpose
AddedAbilities.Text: (Once per battle, per unit) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit can make a selection for its Singular Purpose ability (this replaces the previous selection).

Rule.Title: LEADER-BEASTS
Rule.Text:
Friendly Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons/Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons units have:
	▪ Tyranid Warriors.
	▪ Battleline.
Tyranid Warriors/Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip/Winged Tyranid Prime models from your army have 5+ InSv.

Stratagems.Name: Alien Physiology
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Tyranid Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Tyranid Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Synaptic Micronodes
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Tyranid Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

Stratagems.Name: Parasitic Payload
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Tyranid Warriors unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Tyranid Warriors unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit’s ranged attacks have [IGNORE COVER].

Enhancements.Name: Elevated Might
Enhancements.Description:
Winged Tyranid Prime/Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip model only. This model’s melee attacks:
	▪ Can re-roll wound rolls.
	▪ Have +1 AP.

Enhancements.Name: Ocular Adaptation
Enhancements.Description: Winged Tyranid Prime/Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip model only. This unit’s melee attacks have +1 to hit rolls.

AddedAbilities.Title: LEADER-BEASTS
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Friendly Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons/Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons units have:
	□ Tyranid Warriors.
	□ Battleline.
	▪ Tyranid Warriors/Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip/Winged Tyranid Prime models from your army have 5+ InSv.

AddedAbilities.Title: LEADER-BEASTS
AddedAbilities.Text:
▪ Friendly Tyranid Warriors with Ranged Bio-weapons/Tyranid Warriors with Melee Bio-weapons units have:
	□ Tyranid Warriors.
	□ Battleline.
	▪ Tyranid Warriors/Tyranid Prime with Lash Whip/Winged Tyranid Prime models from your army have 5+ InSv.

Rule.Title: HYPER-ADAPTATIONS
Rule.Text:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for Tyranids units from your army until the end of the battle: 

SWARMING INSTINCTS
Each time a Tyranids model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an enemy Infantry or Swarm unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. 

HYPER-AGGRESSION
Each time a Tyranids model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an enemy Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. 

HIVE PREDATORS
Each time a Tyranids model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an enemy Character unit, if a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Rapid Regeneration
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

Stratagems.Name: Death Frenzy
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Adrenal Surge
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Tyranids units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army and are eligible to fight, or one other Tyranids unit from your army that is eligible to fight.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of those selected units makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Overrun
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just before a Tyranids unit from your army Consolidates.
Stratagems.Target: That Tyranids unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", provided your unit can end its Consolidation move in Unit Coherency and within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move, it can instead make a Normal move of up to 6".

Stratagems.Name: Predatory Imperative
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Tyranids units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other Tyranids unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation. Until the end of the battle round, that hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select the same hyper-adaptation you selected at the start of the first battle round.

Stratagems.Name: Endless Swarm
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Endless Multitude units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other Endless Multitude unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Up to D3+3 destroyed models are returned to each of the selected units.

Enhancements.Name: Alien Cunning
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Tyranids units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Perfectly Adapted
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll, one Damage roll, one Advance roll, one Charge roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Synaptic Linchpin
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. While a friendly Tyranids unit is within 9" of the bearer, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

Enhancements.Name: Adaptive Biology
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. At the start of any turn, if the bearer has fewer than its starting number of wounds remaining, until the end of the battle, it has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

Rule.Title: ENRAGED BEHEMOTHS
Rule.Text: Each time a Tyranids Monster model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength. In addition, while a Tyranids Monster unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is at its Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Corrosive Viscera
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Tyranids Monster model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot Fly is destroyed
Stratagems.Target: That Tyranids Monster model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model's Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

Stratagems.Name: Rampaging Monstrosities
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an acttack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Savage Roar
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that Battle-shock test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Untrammelled Ferocity
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect:
Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:
▪ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
▪ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

Stratagems.Name: Swarm-Guided Salvoes
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and unitl the end of the phase each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that model's Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Massive Impact
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase, just after a Tyranids Monster model from your army ends a change move.
Stratagems.Target: That Tyranids Monster model.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your model and roll six D6. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Enhancements.Name: Ominous Presence
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Monster model only. Add 3 to the bearer's Objective Control characteristic.

Enhancements.Name: Enraged Reserves
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Monster model only. If the bearer is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. It can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Enhancements.Name: Null Nodules
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Monster model only. Once per battle, when a Psychic Attack is allocated to the bearer, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

Enhancements.Name: Monstrous Nemesis
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Monster model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Rule.Title: INSURMUUNTABLE ODDS
Rule.Text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model from a friendly Endless Multitude unit was destroyed as a result of those attacks, that friendly unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

Stratagems.Name: Synaptic Goading
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just before an Endless Multitude unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
Stratagems.Target: That Endless Multitude unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit). All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.

Stratagems.Name: Unending Waves
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Any destroyed Character units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

Stratagems.Name: Teeming Masses
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Swarming Masses
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and if your unit contains 15 or more models, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Bounding Advance
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of the models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Perservation Imperative
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Endless Multitude unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phasem your unti is treated as containing fewer than give models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Relentless Hunger
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

Enhancements.Name: Naturalised Camouflage
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. At the start of the ﬁrst battle round, select up to three friendly Endless Multitude units within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the battle round, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, models in that unit have the Beneﬁt of Cover against that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Piercing Talons
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Adrenalised Onslaught
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Each time the bearer's unit Piles In or Consolidates, models in this unit can move an additional 3".

Rule.Title: FEED THE SWARM
Rule.Text:
In your Command phase, each Harvester unit from your army can Regenerate one friendly Tyranids unit that is within 6" of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. Each time a unit regenerates, do one of the following:
▪ One model in that unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.
▪ One destroyed Infantry model (excluding Characters) is returned to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is an Endless Multitude unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

Stratagems.Name: Broodguard Impulse
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Harvester unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly Tyranids model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your Harvester unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Reclaim Biomass
Stratagems.When: Any phase, when a Tyranids unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model in it is removed from play.
Stratagems.Target: One Harvester unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Regenerate one friendly Tyranids unit within 6" of your Harvester unit (See Feed the Swarm)

Stratagems.Name: Tyrannoformed
Stratagems.When: Command phase
Stratagems.Target: One Harvester unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Stratagems.Name: Ablative Carapace
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phasem just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Harvester unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Unit the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, until the end of the phase models in your unti have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

Stratagems.Name: Secure Biomass
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phasem melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unti is a Harvester unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.

Stratagems.Name: Rapacious Hunger
Stratagems.When: Your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit rom your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit immeadiately Regenerates (See Feed the Swarm). When doing so, if your unit is a Harvester unit and you choose for one model to regain up to D3 lost wounds, that model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

Enhancements.Name: Biophagic Flow (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. While a friendly Harvester model is within 12" of the bearer, when using the Feed the Swarm ability, that Harvester model can Regenerate one friendly Tyranids unit that is within 9" instead of one within 6".

Enhancements.Name: Instinctive Defence
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Harvester units, when you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is -1 CP. In addition, while the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Harvester units, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

Enhancements.Name: Parasitic Biomorphology
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit. The first time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit in the Fight phase while the bearer is within 6" of one or more Harvester units, until the end of battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

Enhancements.Name: Regenerating Monstrosity
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only (excluding Monster models). The bearer's unit can be regenerated up to twice per phase, instead of once.

Rule.Title: QUESTING TENDRILS
Rule.Text:
QUESTING TENDRILS
Tyranids units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. Vanguard Invader units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

Vanguard PRIME
Deathleaper loses Hunter Organism rule and can be your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Surprise Assault
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Vanguard Invader unit from your army has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: That Vanguard Invader unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit that was selected as the target of one or more of your unit’s attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the Battle-shock test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Assassin Beasts
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Vanguard Invader Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Seeded Broods
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that is in Reserves, or up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army that are in Reserves.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, for purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

Stratagems.Name: Hypersensory Scillia
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army that are within 8" of that enemy unit, or one other Tyranids Infantry unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Unseen Lurkers
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Vanguard Invader unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.

Stratagems.Name: Invisible Hunter
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Vanguard Invader units from your army, or one Tyranids Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
Stratagems.Restrictions: The targeted units must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Chameleonic
Enhancements.Description: Vanguard Invader model only. The bearer has the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets the bearer's unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Hunting Grounds
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your opponent sets up a Reserves unit on the battlefield, roll one D6: on a 2+ that unit must make a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Neuronode
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. After both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three Vanguard Invader units from your army and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Stalker
Enhancements.Description: Vanguard Invader model only. At the start of the battle, select one enemy unit. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and Wound roll.

Rule.Title: SYNAPTIC IMPERATIVES
Rule.Text:
At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a Tyranids unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle.
	▪ Synaptic Augmentation: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
	▪ Surging Vitality: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
	▪ Goaded to Slaughter: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: The Smothering Shadow
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.
Stratagems.Target: One Synapse unit from your army with 12" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Synaptic Channelling
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Synapse unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Unit the end of the turn, while a friendly Tyranids unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

Stratagems.Name: Irresistible Will
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Synapse unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the Synapse unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Tyranids model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the attacking model's unit is within 6" of your Synapse unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Reinforced Hive Node
Stratagems.When: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Synapse unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Imperative Dominance
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one Synaptic Imperative, even if you have already selected that imperative this battle. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your unit instead of any other Synaptic Imperative that is active for your army.

Stratagems.Name: Override Instincts
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that is withinSynapse Range of your army and made a Fall Back move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a change this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Power of the Hive Mind
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Psyker model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of psychic weapons equipped by the wearer of 1.

Enhancements.Name: Psychostatic Disruption
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Synapse model only. Enemy units that arrive on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up with 12" of the bearer. In addition, once per battle, during the first or battle round, when your opponent declares that a unit will arrive on the battlefield from Strategic Reserves, the bearer can use this enhancement. If it does, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy cannot arrive on the battlefield this turn.

Enhancements.Name: Synaptic Control
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Synapse model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of the attack.

Enhancements.Name: The Dirgeheart of Kharis
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids Synapse model only. While an enemy unit is within 9" of the bearer, worse that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

Rule.Title: SURPRISE ASSAULT
Rule.Text:
Each time a Tyranids model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Each time a Burrower unit from your army is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, place a circular 40mm Tunnel Marker anywhere on the battlefield within 1" of that unit and more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.

In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, when you set up a unit on the battlefield from Reserves, you can set that unit up wholly within 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy units.

If an enemy model (excluding Aircraft) ends any kind of move within 3" of one of your Tunnel Markers, that Tunnel Marker is removed from the battlefield.

KEYWORDS
Mawloc and Trygon units from your army have the Burrower keyword.

In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 Trygon models from your army. The selected units gain the Character keyword.

Designer’s Note: This means that the selected models can be given Enhancements and one of them can be selected as your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Adaptive Optimisation
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Mawloc or Trygon unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the Synapse keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Replenishing Swarms
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army, wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.
Stratagems.Effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 to your unit, with their full wounds remaining, instead.

Stratagems.Name: Enfilading Emergence
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

Stratagems.Name: Tunnel Network
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more of your Tunnel Markers and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again, wholly within 9" of another Tunnel Marker you placed, and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Swarming Assault
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids Monster unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, friendly Tyranids units within 6" of your unit can re-roll Charge rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Retreat Below
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tyranids unit or up to two Burrower units from your army that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Synaptic Strategy
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Tremor Senses
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three friendly Tyranids units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Vanguard Intellect
Enhancements.Description: Tyranids model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Enhancements.Name: Trygon Prime
Enhancements.Description: Trygon model only. The bearer gains the Synapse keyword. Improve the Strength and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

ArmyRules.Title: SYNAPSE
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Tyranids, while a Tyranids unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly Synapse models, that Tyranids unit is said to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your army. While a Tyranids unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army:
▪ Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
▪ Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

ArmyRules.Title: SHADOW IN THE WARP
ArmyRules.Text: If your Army Faction is Tyranids, once per battle, in either player’s Command phase, if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or more Synapse units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.
